tool.name: odgi build
tool.description: construct a dynamic succinct variation graph from GFA
tool.command: #set $in_ext = 'gfa.gz' if str($gfa.ext) == 'gfa1.gz' else 'gfa' ln -sf '$gfa' 'input.${in_ext}' && odgi build -g 'input.${in_ext}' -o '$odgi_output' --threads \${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} $sort $optimize #if $to_gfa --to-gfa > '$gfa_output' #end if

param.label: Topological sort
param.help: Apply generalized topological sort and reassign node IDs in order.

param.label: Also output GFA
param.help: Also emit a GFA1 export of the graph.

tool.help:
**odgi build** — construct the succinct binary `.og` graph from a GFA1 input.
The `.og` format is much faster to query than GFA, and is the input format for the rest of the odgi subcommands (`stats`, `viz`, `paths`, `pav`, ...).
